circular_title: GST Advisory: New Invoice Management System (IMS) - April 2026
circular_summary: Invoice Management System mandatory from April 1, 2026 for all GST filers.
actions: Implement the new Invoice Management System (IMS) for GST filing from April 1, 2026
email_subject: Compliance Advisory: GST Advisory: New Invoice Management System (IMS) - April 2026
email_body:
{
  "subject": "GST Advisory: Implementation of New Invoice Management System (IMS) for Kapoor Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd.",
  "body": "Dear Neha Kapoor, 

As an IT and software export company, Kapoor Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd. is required to comply with the new GST regulations, specifically the implementation of the Invoice Management System (IMS) for GST filing. This applies to your company as it will facilitate accurate and efficient GST returns.

To ensure compliance, please take the following actions:
1. Implement the new Invoice Management System (IMS) for GST filing from April 1, 2026

The deadline for implementation is **April 1, 2026**. Given the high risk level associated with non-compliance, we urge you to prioritize this implementation to avoid potential penalties.

Please do not hesitate to contact us if you require any assistance with the implementation process. We are committed to supporting you in maintaining compliance with the regulatory requirements.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team"
}
internal_notes: Cross-check with GST filing team to ensure smooth implementation of IMS, verify compliance with GST regulations
